title: Compared to Estimates, Monolithic (MPWR) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics

title: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (MPWR) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 31, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Genevieve Cunningham - Senior Manager, Marketing Communications Bernie Blegen - Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Michael Hsing - Chief Executive Officer and Founder Conference Call Participants Ross Seymore - Deutsche Bank Quinn Bolton - Needham Rick Schafer - Oppenheimer Jeremy Kwan - Stifel William Stein - Truist Matt Ramsay - Cowen Chris Caso - Wolfe Genevieve Cunningham Welcome, everyone, to the MPS Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Webinar. My name is Genevieve Cunningham, and I will be the moderator for this webinar.

title: Monolithic Power (MPWR) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Monolithic Power (MPWR) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.82 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.81 per share. This compares to earnings of $3.25 per share a year ago.

title: Monolithic's stock slips as outlook overshadows earnings beat
text: Monolithic Power Systems Inc. MPWR, +2.56% shares fell in the extended session Monday after the computer power system maker's in-line forecast took away from its earnings beat. Monolithic shares fell more than 4% after hours, following a 2.6% rise in the regular session to close at $559.49.
